import React from 'react'; import './DashboardPage.css'; const DashboardPage = ({ stats, peersCount, groups, setView, selectGroup, fetchStats }) => { return (

Dashboard

Real-time overview of your usage • Updates every 5 seconds

👥

Groups

{stats.groupCount || 0}

Active groups
📄

Files

{stats.fileCount || 0}

Files uploaded
💻

Peers Online

{stats.peersOnline || 0}

Devices on network

⚡ Quick Actions

); }; export default DashboardPage;
